segments.text: When He had come down from the mountain, great multitudes followed Him.
And behold, a leper came and worshiped Him, saying,
Lord, if You are willing, You can make me clean.
segments.speaker: Leper

segments.text: Then Jesus put out His hand and touched him, saying,
I am willing; be cleansed.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And Jesus said to him,
See that you tell no one; but go your way, show yourself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, as a testimony to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now when Jesus had entered Capernaum, a centurion came to Him, pleading with Him,
Lord, my servant is lying at home paralyzed, dreadfully tormented.
segments.speaker: Centurion

segments.text: And Jesus said to him,
I will come and heal him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, I am not worthy that You should come under my roof. But only speak a word, and my servant will be healed.
segments.speaker: Centurion

segments.text: For I also am a man under authority, having soldiers under me. And I say to this one, 'Go,' and he goes; and to another, 'Come,' and he comes; and to my servant, 'Do this,' and he does it.
segments.speaker: Centurion

segments.text: When Jesus heard it, He marveled, and said to those who followed,
Assuredly, I say to you, I have not found such great faith, not even in Israel!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And I say to you that many will come from east and west, and sit down with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But the sons of the kingdom will be cast out into outer darkness. There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then Jesus said to the centurion,
Go your way; and as you have believed, so let it be done for you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And his servant was healed that same hour.
Now when Jesus had come into Peter's house, He saw his wife's mother lying sick with a fever.
So He touched her hand, and the fever left her. And she arose and served them.
When evening had come, they brought to Him many who were demon-possessed. And He cast out the spirits with a word, and healed all who were sick,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Isaiah the prophet, saying:
He Himself took our infirmities And bore our sicknesses.
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: And when Jesus saw great multitudes about Him, He gave a command to depart to the other side.
Teacher, I will follow You wherever You go.
segments.speaker: Scribe

segments.text: And Jesus said to him,
Foxes have holes and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay His head.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, let me first go and bury my father.
segments.speaker: Disciple

segments.text: But Jesus said to him,
Follow Me, and let the dead bury their own dead.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now when He got into a boat, His disciples followed Him.
And suddenly a great tempest arose on the sea, so that the boat was covered with the waves. But He was asleep.
Then His disciples came to Him and awoke Him, saying,
Lord, save us! We are perishing!
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: But He said to them,
Why are you fearful, O you of little faith?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then He arose and rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was a great calm.
So the men marveled, saying,
Who can this be, that even the winds and the sea obey Him?
segments.speaker: Men

segments.text: When He had come to the other side, to the country of the Gergesenes, there met Him two demon-possessed men, coming out of the tombs, exceedingly fierce, so that no one could pass that way.
What have we to do with You, Jesus, You Son of God? Have You come here to torment us before the time?
segments.speaker: Demon-possessed men

segments.text: Now a good way off from them there was a herd of many swine feeding.
If You cast us out, permit us to go away into the herd of swine.
segments.speaker: Demons

segments.text: And He said to them,
Go.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So when they had come out, they went into the herd of swine. And suddenly the whole herd of swine ran violently down the steep place into the sea, and perished in the water.
Then those who kept them fled; and they went away into the city and told everything, including what had happened to the demon-possessed men.
And behold, the whole city came out to meet Jesus. And when they saw Him, they begged Him to depart from their region.
